algorithm.title: Combat Algorithm
algorithm.subtitle: Your step-by-step decision tree for combat turns.
algorithm.empty: No combat algorithm defined. Switch to Edit Mode to create a step-by-step combat decision tree for your character.
algorithm.importJSONHint: Edit the example below, then Confirm. Each step has an icon, a title, and one or more decision branches with bullet lines.
algorithm.importJSONHintCurrent: This is your current algorithm in JSON form. Edit it, then Confirm: what you confirm replaces every step.
algorithm.importJSONPlaceholder: Edit the example, or paste your own steps here…
algorithm.importJSONErrorSyntax: That isn't valid JSON yet: check for a missing comma, bracket, or quotation mark, then try again.
algorithm.importJSONErrorNotArray: The top level must be a list of steps, wrapped in square brackets [ … ].
algorithm.importJSONErrorShape: Each step needs an icon, a title, and a steps list, and every branch needs a bullets list. Compare yours to the example.
algorithm.importJSONSuccess: Algorithm imported. Tap Undo to revert.
algorithm.removeStepMessage: This deletes the step and all of its decision branches.
